channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news and analysis from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇨🇩🦠 Ebola Outbreak in Eastern Congo Kills 80, US CDC Monitoring
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo's Ituri province has killed at least 80 people, with 246 suspected cases identified. The US CDC is monitoring the situation and providing technical assistance to DRC and Uganda.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧🕊️ Israel and Lebanon Extend Ceasefire by 45 Days After US-Brokered Talks
item.description: Israel and Lebanon agreed to extend their ceasefire by 45 days after Washington-mediated negotiations, with further meetings planned in coming weeks. The ceasefire has reduced conflict between Israel and Hezbollah in southern Lebanon.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚖️ Iran FM Says Trust Is Main Obstacle in Nuclear Talks With US
item.description: Iran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi said a lack of trust is the biggest obstacle in negotiations to end the war with the US, expressing openness to diplomatic help from China. He acknowledged that enriched uranium discussions have hit a deadlock.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷📉 Analysis: Trump's Geopolitical Brinkmanship Hits Wall With Iran
item.description: Reuters analysis examines how President Trump's blustery negotiating style, which won concessions on other issues, has faced significant challenges with Iran amid ongoing tensions over nuclear weapons and the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇪🇸🎤 Spain Boycotts Eurovision Over Israel Participation
item.description: Spain's public broadcaster withdrew from the Eurovision Song Contest, protesting Israel's participation over its war against Hamas in Gaza. The boycott marks the first time in seven years Spain will not participate.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Accepts 20-Year Iran Nuclear Freeze as Sufficient for Deal
item.description: President Trump indicated he would accept a 20-year suspension of Iran nuclear program, a shift from previous demands for permanent cessation. The comments came after his summit with Xi in Beijing, with both sides still far apart on key issues.

item.title: 🇳🇬⚔️ US and Nigerian Forces Kill Senior ISIS Commander
item.description: President Trump announced that US and Nigerian military forces killed Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, described as the second-in-command of ISIS globally and "the most active terrorist in the world," in a joint operation in Nigeria.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump-Xi Summit Yields Trade Deals, Leaves Iran and Taiwan Unresolved
item.description: President Trump's two-day summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping produced agreements on Boeing aircraft and agricultural exports, but key issues including Iran, Taiwan, and AI remain unresolved. Both leaders projected optimism despite limited substantive progress.

item.title: 🇰🇿🇹🇷 Kazakhstan and Turkey Recast Their Eurasian Role
item.description: Kazakhstan and Turkey are deepening strategic ties amid shifting global dynamics, with both nations seeking to balance relations between Western powers and emerging multipolar influences in Central Asia.

item.title: 🇨🇳🔫 Chinese Defense Firms Break Sniper Rifle Range Record
item.description: Chinese defense manufacturers claim to have set new records for sniper rifle range, potentially challenging Western military technology superiority in precision weaponry.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇩🇪 Chinese Investor Acquires 120-Year-Old German Sewing Machine Maker
item.description: A Chinese investor has acquired Dürkopp Adler, a historic German sewing machine manufacturer founded in 1860, reflecting ongoing cross-border industrial consolidation and Chinese investment in European manufacturing heritage.

item.title: 🇺🇦🔄 Russia and Ukraine Swap 205 Prisoners Each in Latest Exchange
item.description: Russia and Ukraine conducted another prisoner swap, exchanging 205 prisoners of war on each side, continuing a pattern of periodic exchanges despite ongoing hostilities.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚠️ Zelensky: Russia Considering Plan to Attack NATO via Belarus
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky warned that Russia may be planning an attack on a NATO country through Belarus, raising concerns about potential escalation of the conflict beyond Ukraine's borders.

item.title: 🇸🇩💥 Sudan War Intensifies With Drone Strikes on Paramilitary Forces
item.description: Sudan's military has intensified attacks against the RSF paramilitary using drones, marking a new phase in the country's civil war with increased civilian casualties and displacement.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇺🇸 Taiwan: US Arms Sales Are Cornerstone of Regional Peace
item.description: Taiwan emphasized that continued US arms sales are essential for maintaining regional peace and stability, following President Trump's comments that he remains undecided on new weapons sales to the island.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇳🇬 Bloomberg: US-Nigeria Kill ISIS Leader in Joint Operation
item.description: US and Nigerian forces killed an ISIS leader hiding in Africa, with President Trump stating that his death has "greatly diminished" the group's global operations.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Guardian: Trump Leaves China Without Breakthroughs on Iran or Taiwan
item.description: President Trump's summit with Xi Jinping ended with praise for trade progress but left key issues unresolved, including Iran's nuclear program, Taiwan's status, and AI technology restrictions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Xi Gives Trump Rare Tour of Secret Garden in Chinese Government Center
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping offered President Trump a rare tour of a secluded garden in the heart of China's government compound, a gesture seen as emphasizing the personal rapport between the two leaders.

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 Russia Strikes Kyiv Apartment Block, Killing 24
item.description: Russian forces struck a residential apartment building in Kyiv, killing at least 24 people in one of the deadliest attacks on the Ukrainian capital. President Zelensky condemned the strike and vowed retaliation.

item.title: 🇮🇳🌏 India Issues BRICS Chair Statement Amid Gulf War Differences
item.description: India, as BRICS chair, issued a statement acknowledging divergent views among member states regarding the Gulf conflict, highlighting the bloc's struggle to present a unified position on the Iran-US war.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump and Xi Agree Iran Cannot Have Nuclear Weapons
item.description: President Trump stated that he and Chinese President Xi agreed that Iran cannot be allowed to possess nuclear weapons, though the leaders offered different visions for how to achieve that goal amid ongoing tensions.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇵🇭 Japan Considers Missile Exports to Philippines
item.description: Japan is considering exporting surface-to-ship missiles to the Philippines after Manila expressed interest in acquiring the Type 88 system, reflecting Tokyo's more assertive regional security role amid concerns about China.

item.title: 🇲🇲💰 Myanmar Counts Costs of Iran War Impact
item.description: CNN examines how the Iran-US conflict is affecting economies across Asia, with Myanmar among the nations feeling economic strain from disrupted trade routes and oil price volatility.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Kyiv Post: Latest Ukraine-Russia War Developments
item.description: Ongoing coverage of the Ukraine-Russia conflict with updates on military operations, diplomatic efforts, and humanitarian impacts.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Kyiv Independent: Latest Ukraine Coverage
item.description: Continuing coverage of the war in Ukraine with analysis and frontline reporting.
